script.usage: Handwritten letter page, signature, polaroid subtitles

components_instructions.global: Use Framer Motion for scroll animations. Implement react-tsparticles for subtle floating gold particles (like fireflies). Audio player must be a floating button with 'music-toggle-btn' data-testid. DO NOT use plain white backgrounds anywhere except the letter/polaroids.
components_instructions.page_1_surprise: Full viewport height. Dark gradient `bg-gradient-to-b from-[#050914] to-[#0A1128]`. Centered emotional content. CTA Button with a soft glowing gold shadow. Button text 'Open My Gift ❤️', `data-testid='open-gift-btn'`.
components_instructions.page_2_gallery: Grid layout (cols: 1, md: 2, lg: 3). 6 Photo Cards styled as polaroids. White frame (cream/paper color), image inside, handwritten text below. Use `rotate-1`, `-rotate-2` for organic feel. On click, use `framer-motion` layout animation to expand to ~70% screen width postcard. Backdrop must be heavily blurred (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60`). Close button `data-testid='close-postcard-btn'`.
components_instructions.page_3_letter: Simulate a piece of parchment or cream paper in the center. Background behind it remains dark. Paper color `#FDFBF7`. Font `Caveat`. Use `box-shadow` for depth. Emotional letter from Pranjlee to Pappa. Apply subtle paper texture if possible or just soft warm cream color.
components_instructions.page_4_closing: Dark background. Huge Playfair Display 'Happy Father's Day, Pappa ❤️'. Use `react-confetti` (subtle configuration, perhaps gold and white colors only) upon reaching this section. Signature 'With Love, Your Daughter Pranjlee' in Caveat font.

polaroid_cards_data.title: The Beginning
polaroid_cards_data.message: The moment you first held me, my safe place forever.

polaroid_cards_data.title: My First Hero
polaroid_cards_data.message: You taught me how to walk, and how to fly.

polaroid_cards_data.title: Every Sacrifice
polaroid_cards_data.message: For everything you gave up to see me smile.

polaroid_cards_data.title: Every Achievement
polaroid_cards_data.message: My success is just a reflection of your hard work.

polaroid_cards_data.title: Forever Grateful
polaroid_cards_data.message: No matter how old I get, I'll always be your little girl.
